site.main_title: Li Zhang | Java Backend Developer Resume | Spring Boot | Germany
site.ats_title: Li Zhang | ATS Resume | Java Backend Developer | Germany

summary: Java Backend Developer with 4.5 years of experience building high-traffic logistics backend systems at Pinduoduo. Strong background in Java, Spring Boot, Kafka, MySQL, Redis, RESTful APIs, asynchronous processing, and production troubleshooting. Supported backend services where peak traffic reached around 5,000 QPS and over 100 million daily operation requests during promotional peaks. Strong focus on concurrency control, idempotency, transaction boundaries, and Kafka-based asynchronous workflows.

education.subtitle: MSc in Computer Science
education.note: Relevant coursework: Object-Oriented Programming with Java, Software Engineering, Databases, Computer Architecture.

education.subtitle: BEng in Communication Engineering
education.note: Engineering foundation in communication systems, computer fundamentals, mathematics, and problem-solving.

skills.label: Backend Development
skills.value: Java, Spring Boot, RESTful APIs, Dubbo/RPC, MyBatis, Spring Data JPA/Hibernate

skills.label: Data / Messaging

experience.tech_stack: Tech Stack: Java, Spring Boot, Dubbo RPC, Kafka, MySQL, MyBatis, Redis, Elasticsearch, Kubernetes
experience.note: Worked on Duoduo Parcel Pickup Station, a high-traffic backend platform used by pickup station operators to manage parcel lifecycle data and trigger downstream notifications.

bullets.label: Backend
bullets.text: Developed Java/Spring Boot/Dubbo RPC backend services for core parcel workflows, including preprocessing, check-in/check-out operations, inventory checks, shelf changes, returns, and status transitions.

bullets.label: Scale
bullets.text: Supported backend APIs where preprocessing traffic reached around 5,000 QPS and daily core operation requests could exceed 100 million during traffic peaks.

bullets.label: Concurrency & Consistency
bullets.text: Used Redis-based distributed locking, Redis caching, MySQL sharding, and local transactions to support high-concurrency parcel operations and maintain consistency between different records.

bullets.label: Messaging & Reliability
bullets.text: Implemented Kafka-based asynchronous notification workflows, including intelligent voice, delayed SMS delivery, cancellation handling, retry handling, and idempotent processing.

bullets.label: Search & Observability
bullets.text: Used Elasticsearch for cross-station and complex parcel searches, and used Kibana and internal metrics platforms for log analysis, monitoring, production troubleshooting, and release support in a Kubernetes-based environment.

experience.organization: Guangzhou Huizhi Communication Technology Co., Ltd.

bullets.label: Summary
bullets.text: Supported telecommunications projects through technical solution support, bidding documentation, and customer communication, building strong requirement analysis and cross-functional collaboration skills.

project.note: Took a planned career break after leaving Pinduoduo, including travel, relocation preparation, and focused backend engineering refresh for the German job market.

bullets.label: Project
bullets.text: Built Parcel-Hub-Core, a Java 21 / Spring Boot logistics backend project covering parcel inbound/outbound workflows, user authentication, parcel status transitions, and event publishing.

bullets.label: Engineering Focus
bullets.text: Practiced Kafka-based asynchronous messaging, Transactional Outbox, PostgreSQL, SpringData JPA/Hibernate, Redis, Spring Security JWT, integration testing with Testcontainers, and CI workflows with GitHub Actions.
